title: goniophlebium cambricum
intro: Goniophlebium cambricum, a type of epiphytic fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Goniophlebium cambricum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
